entries.context: A label for human use intended to distinguish like teams.  E.g. the "red" vs. "green" trauma teams.
entries.source: Cercle de soins de Mr Jacques Thobois

entries.context: A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system.
A name associated with the organization.
A list of alternate names that the organization is known as, or was known as in the past.
This component contains the house number, apartment number, street name, street direction,  P.O. Box number, delivery hints, and similar address information.
The name of the city, town, suburb, village or other community or delivery center.
A postal code designating a region defined by the postal service.
Country - a nation as commonly understood or generally accepted.
The name of the city, town, suburb, village or other community or delivery center.
The part of a name that links to the genealogy. In some cultures (e.g. Eritrea) the family name of a son is the first name of his father.
A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system.
entries.source: Entité à contacter en cas d'urgence
